Notes:
Heat needs to move to REST/API for automation with xrm.
PDA has also expressed interest in the API for automation with their system.

System needs to be moderized and to keep up with evolving business requirements.
- data is separated between Heat and Heat X.
- administation panel is separated between Heat and Heat X
- UI is from the point of view of vendor and is not flexible for utilities.
- to reduce amount of training that is necessary in using system
- thiings should only take less then 3 clicks
- visual cues help to understand current state of an application
- reduce use of colours and fonts for colour blind

Redo search functionality
- fix special characters
- expand on advance search
- allow utilities to see all vendors in one listing verses loading each vendor

Merge Basic and Advanced evaluations into one listing
- currently need to go to Heat to see basic
- currently need to go to Heat X to see advanced
- provide a guide beside the section

- as more offerings get added they get slotted here
- ability to have a high level overview of the application itself
